data.current_description: Creates a new Interac e-Transfer payment to a beneficiary via email, phone, or bank account.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new Interac e-Transfer payment in CAD to a beneficiary using one of three delivery methods: email address, phone number, or bank account details. Requires OAuth 2.0 bearer token authentication. Accepts a PaymentRequest object containing debtor account information, creditor details, and payment amount. Returns a 202 Accepted response with a payment reference ID for tracking. The payment is queued for processing and will be delivered 24/7. Debtor account is debited immediately upon acceptance.
